mapper.sql: id, user_id, activity_id, goods_id, order_no, seckill_price, goods_name, goods_img, `status`, expire_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_seckill_order (user_id, activity_id, goods_id, order_no, seckill_price, goods_name, goods_img, `status`, expire_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_seckill_order
id,
user_id,
activity_id,
goods_id,
order_no,
seckill_price,
goods_name,
goods_img,
`status`,
expire_time,
is_deleted,
create_time,
update_time,

mapper.update:
update t_seckill_order
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_img = #{goodsImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=TINYINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_seckill_order set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goods_id = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seckill_price = #{seckillPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_img = #{goodsImg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, expire_time = #{expireTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=TINYINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
